χάρις — "grace" (unmerited favor) vs. "favor" (patron's gift in social context). The patron-client background charges this word with economic and social concreteness.

flags.note: σάρξ — "flesh" (physical body, neutral) vs. "sinful nature" (Paul's ethical sense). Using one English word across both contexts either over- or under-interprets Paul.
